title: rosa communis var. latibractea
intro: Rosa communis var. latibractea, also known as the fragrant rose or wild rose, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Rosa communis var. latibractea include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to improve sleep quality and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Rosa communis var. latibractea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for topical use, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
